/usr/bin/c++   -Wall  -Wextra  -Wshadow  -Wfloat-equal  -Wold-style-cast  -Werror  -pedantic  -pedantic-errors  -fstrict-aliasing  -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-deprecated  -Wstrict-aliasing CMakeFiles/perf_counters_test.dir/perf_counters_test.cc.o -o perf_counters_test  liboutput_test_helper.a ../src/libbenchmark_main.a ../src/libbenchmark.a -lrt
